templateManager.title: Templates
templateManager.infoLoadFromTemplates: Load basic thematic configurations for specific types of analyses. You can find the data which will be loaded in the templates' overview. To load templates, areas must first be selected. Data can only be exported from templates once a template has been loaded.
templateManager.optionalComponents: Optional components of the report to be exported
templateManager.creatingReport: Report is being created. Please wait.
templateManager.reportSuccess: The report has been successfully generated. The download will start automatically.
templateManager.note: Note: loaded templates cannot be edited.
templateManager.infrastructureHint: Note: If there are more than 10 institutions, no infrastructure data table is displayed.

errors.wrongFileFormat: The file is not in the correct format.
errors.notAllowLoaded: can not be loaded without selected district(s).
errors.invalidReportTitle: A maximum of {{reportTitleMaxLength}} characters are allowed
errors.invalidSelectedAreasName: A maximum of {{selectedAreasNameMaxLength}} characters are allowed
errors.invalidAuthor: A maximum of {{authorMaxLength}} characters are allowed
